verses.text: Israel mite ahih leh a gahpha mahmah leenggui tawh kibang hi. Cithei semsem leh biakna tau tam lam semsem uh hi. A gamsung uh cithei semsem leh biakna song a hoihbawl semsem uh hi
A lungsim uh manlo ahih manin tu-in a mawhna uh thuak ding uh hi. Topa Pasian in amau' biakna taute suzanin, a biakna songte uh suksiatsak ding hi
A sawtloin hih mite in, “ Topa kihtalo ihih manin kumpi i nei kei hi. Kumpi khat lel in eite-a' ding bang hong hihsak thei ding ahi hiam?” ci ding uh hi
Amaute a kampi bek uh hi a, a kampi bekun thu genin thuciamna a bawl uh hi. Lolai-a tumakuakte sungah gunei kiak a po mah bangin thusia neihna hong khang hi

Bethaven khua-a bawngno milim a taanna uh hangin Samaria khuapi sunga a teng mite lau-in ling ding uh a, amaute leh tua milim na a sem siampite a thum ding uh hi. A etlawmna teng a maiman' ciangin a tau ding uh hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh Assiria gama kumpi lianpa tungah siaha piak dingin tua milim kipuakhia ding hi. Thu kigen zui-in milim a biakna hangun Israel-te mindai-in maizum ding uh hi
Tui tunga tuiphuan laam bangin a kumpite uh maimang ding hi

Israel-te in milim bia-in mawhna a bawlna munte kisusia ding a, a biakna taute uh tungah ling leh kiak a po ding hi. Tua ciangin mite in mual liante kiangah, “Hong vukcip un,” ci ding uh a, mual neute kiangah, “Hong dengcip un,” a ci ding uh hi
Gibeah khua-ah a khialh uha kipanin kei tungah hong khialhna uh Israel mite tawp nailo hi. Tua ahih manin Gibeah khua-ah gal in amaute pha ding hi
Hih mimawhte thuhilhna dingin gim ka pia ding a, a thuapthuapin a mawhna hangun thuhilhna dingin minam dangte in amaute hong sim ding uh hi

Israel pen limtakin a kihilhsa, an a cil nuam bawngla tawh kibang hi. Ahi zongin a etlawm a ngawngzangah kol bulhin lo khawhsak ding ka ngaihsun hi. Lokhawhna leeng, Judah ka kaisak a, lei kalhkhapna singka, Israel ka kaisak hi

Khai tuh bangin thuman tuhin, kei nong itna hangun a piang thuphate at un. Note' Topa keima lamah nong kihei ding uh a hun hita ahih manin lo thak lei kalkham un. Tua hi leh kei hong pai-in note tungah thupha kong pia ding hi, ka ci hi
Ahi zongin note in thusia na tuh zawsop uh a, thusia gah na at uh hi. Na zuauna uh hangin a piang gahte na ne uh hi. Note in na sakol leengte uh leh na galkap tamna uh muangkha na hih manun

gal in na mite uh hong sim ding a, na kulh muan'huaite uh kisusia ding hi. Kumpi Shalman in a galsimna-ah Betharbel khua sugawpin, nupite leh a tate leilak den'na-in a sih mangsak hun lai mah a bang ding hi
Israel mite aw, note' gamtat hoihlohna hangin tu-a bang teekin note tungah thu hong piang ding hi. Galdo a kipat phetin Israel kumpipa si pah ding hi.
